assertions.description: @container scroll-state(scrolled: top) parses inside a stylesheet.
assertions.test: (()=>{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();try{s.replaceSync('@container scroll-state(scrolled: top) { div { color: red } }');return s.cssRules.length===1;}catch(e){return false;}})()
(()=>{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();try{s.replaceSync('@container scroll-state(scrolled: bottom) { div { color: red } }');return s.cssRules.length===1;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: scrolled: left is accepted for horizontal direction.
assertions.test: (()=>{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();try{s.replaceSync('@container scroll-state(scrolled: left) { div { color: red } }');return s.cssRules.length===1;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: CSSContainerRule produced from a scroll-state query exposes its containerQuery text.
assertions.test: (()=>{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@container scroll-state(scrolled: top) { div { color: red } }');const r=s.cssRules[0];return r && r.containerQuery && r.containerQuery.includes('scroll-state');})()
